a: Microsoft OneNote (Free with paid options for increased storage and Copilot features)
Apple Notes (Free with paid iCloud storage upgrades)
Google Keep (Free with paid Google storage upgrades)
Notion (Free for personal use, paid plans for teams)
Obsidian (Free for personal use, paid plans for commercial use and sync)
Joplin (Free and open-source, optional paid sync)
Simplenote (Free)
ClickUp (Free plan available, paid plans for more features)
Evernote (Free basic plan, paid plans for more features and storage)
Bear (Free with a premium subscription for advanced features like cloud sync)
Notability (Free download with in-app purchases for Notability Plus subscription)
GoodNotes (Paid app)
Nebo (Free download with in-app purchases for full feature packs)
UpNote (Free with a premium subscription for more features and devices)
Agenda (Free with paid premium features, or a one-time purchase for lifetime access)
Noteshelf (Paid app)
CollaNote (Free)
Anytype (Free)
Capacities (Free plan, paid plans for pro features)
Notedrafts Pro (One-time purchase)
